moments.title: Compute to Power Bottleneck
moments.oracleView: AIの主戦場はモデル性能から、電力・冷却・送電・立地という物理制約へ移り始めている。
valueChain: Compute: NVDA, AMD, AVGO, TSM, ASML
Data center buildout: EQIX, DLR, CORZ, IREN, APLD
Power/cooling/grid: VRT, ETN, GEV, CEG, VST, BE, SMR
Materials/industrial: CAT, NUE, FCX, MP
Capital/structured finance: KKR, APO, BX

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARKK adding X-Energy for about $970.5K on 2026-07-01 and another $980.9K on 2026-07-02 after the $4.4M add on 2026-06-29, extending ARK's willingness to keep layering reactor-side power exposure even as the broader July 1-2 rotation also widened into CRCL, BLSH, and TSLA.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK leaning back into front-end AI compute on 2026-06-23 and 2026-06-24 by adding Cerebras Systems across ARKK and ARKW for about $5.8M and then $19.4M, extending the post-IPO CBRS accumulation even as the same two-day window still featured large Roku sales elsewhere in the complex.

AP reported that on 2026-06-18 the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission unanimously ordered six regional grid operators to speed interconnection processes for very large loads such as AI data centers, while requiring those customers to bear the full cost of any needed grid upgrades.
ARK says it posts portfolio holdings files daily and sends trade information for actively managed ETFs, with exclusions and reconciliation caveats.
Daily ARK trade rows should be imported from the latest trade file with fund, ticker, direction, shares, and notes as raw facts.
ARK said it initiated a new position in Crusoe and described it as an energy-first AI infrastructure company building scalable computing platforms for next-generation AI workloads.

Cerebras priced its IPO at $185.00 per share for 30,000,000 Class A shares, said trading would start on Nasdaq on 2026-05-14 under ticker CBRS, and described its WSE-3 as the company's flagship AI processor.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARKK buying Cerebras Systems for $25.7M on 2026-05-20, and the same tracker marks CBRS as a newly opened position in both ARKK and ARKW on 2026-05-15.

NVIDIA reported Q1 FY2027 revenue of $81.6B, Data Center revenue of $75.2B, a Q2 FY2027 revenue outlook of $91.0B, an additional $80.0B share repurchase authorization, and a quarterly dividend increase to $0.25 per share, reinforcing that the AI buildout is still scaling at infrastructure rather than software speed.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK following through on Cerebras Systems on 2026-05-27 with additional CBRS buys in both ARKK ($165.0K) and ARKW ($44.3K), reinforcing that the first-week IPO purchase was not a one-day trade.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK leaning further into front-end AI compute on 2026-06-01 by buying NVIDIA across ARKK, ARKQ, ARKW, and ARKF ($35.7M, $11.7M, $9.1M, and $4.1M) while also adding Cerebras Systems in ARKK and ARKW ($11.1M and $2.8M), funded in part by broad AMD and Teradyne sales.

Broadcom reported Q2 FY2026 revenue of $22.2B, AI semiconductor revenue of $10.8B up 143% year over year, and Q3 revenue guidance of about $29.4B with AI semiconductor revenue expected to reach $16.0B, extending the case that AI networking and accelerator demand remain in an infrastructure buildout phase.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK broadening its compute stack on 2026-06-04 by buying Broadcom across ARKK, ARKQ, and ARKW ($5.9M, $2.0M, and $1.5M) a day after Broadcom's strong Q2 print, while still funding the move with more Teradyne ($7.0M and $2.3M) and AMD ($1.7M) sales.

X-energy reported Q1 2026 revenues and grant income of $43 million versus $21 million a year earlier, said its IPO added about $1.1 billion of net proceeds, and highlighted NRC, UK GDA, and utility-deployment milestones, reinforcing advanced nuclear as a live AI-power infrastructure leg.

The Financial Times reported that KKR launched Helix Digital Infrastructure with more than $10 billion of commitments from KKR, Vistra, NVIDIA, and the Kuwait Investment Authority to finance integrated data center, power, and connectivity projects.

The Wall Street Journal reported that Broadcom, Apollo, and Blackstone launched the AI XPV Platform with an initial $35 billion tranche to finance AI infrastructure, support more than 20 gigawatts of compute capacity through 2028, and facilitate Anthropic's previously announced expansion of more than 1 gigawatt of compute infrastructure.

moments.title: Agent-led Growth
moments.oracleView: AIエージェントが比較・選定・購買の前段を担うと、ブランド発見のルールが変わる。
valueChain: Model/interface: MSFT, GOOGL, META, AAPL
Enterprise system of record: CRM, NOW, HUBS, ADBE
Discovery/commerce surfaces: SHOP, AMZN, RDFN, ABNB
Measurement layer: AEO and brand visibility startups

evidence.fact: Sequoia published a Training Data episode framing the move from SEO toward agent-led growth.

ARK said Shopify's native support for Model Context Protocol endpoints lets merchants feed product and inventory data directly into the agentic web as AI purchasing agents reshape discovery and buying.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKK buying SHOP ($20.7M) on 2026-05-05.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKK buying SHOP ($6.6M) on 2026-05-04.
Sequoia's AI Ascent 2026 recap said Sonya Huang declared 2026 the year of agents and described models, tools, and harnesses as the three ingredients that have finally come together.
YC's Summer 2026 Requests for Startups argued the next trillion internet users will be AI agents and said agent-first software should be rebuilt around APIs, MCPs, and CLIs rather than human UIs.

moments.title: Stablecoin Financial Rails
moments.oracleView: Stablecoinは投機商品ではなく、国境を越えるドル決済・企業財務・新興国金融の基盤として再評価され始めている。
valueChain: Issuer/exchange: CRCL, COIN, HOOD
Payment and merchant rails: SQ, PYPL, V, MA
Treasury/custody infrastructure: banks, custodians, tokenization platforms
Risk side: compliance, reserves, regulation

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK pressing the regulated-rails basket again on 2026-07-01 and 2026-07-02: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF bought Circle for about $18.4M on 2026-07-01, then the same three funds added Bullish across both sessions for about $3.1M combined, reinforcing that tokenized-equity and stablecoin-market-structure names are still being accumulated rather than treated as one-day trades.
YC's Spring 2026 Requests for Startups includes stablecoin financial services and AI-native hedge funds among requested startup directions.
a16z framed prediction markets as an emerging information and price-discovery layer.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKW buying HOOD ($4.0M) and selling ARKB ($4.1M) on 2026-04-29.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKF buying HOOD ($2.0M) and selling ARKB ($2.0M) on 2026-04-29.

Robinhood said it launched the public testnet for Robinhood Chain, a financial-grade Ethereum Layer 2 built to support tokenized real-world assets, and that the network had already processed more than 100 million transactions.
Coinbase's investor events page lists its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call scheduled for 2026-05-07.

Coinbase said Base processed 62% of total global onchain stablecoin transaction volume, more than 90% of onchain agentic stablecoin transaction volume occurred on Base, and more than 100 million payments had been processed via x402.

Circle said it launched Circle Agent Stack, including Agent Wallets, Agent Marketplace, and gas-free USDC nanopayments via Circle Gateway, explicitly positioning stablecoin rails as financial infrastructure for autonomous software.

evidence.source: Bullish tokenizes its shares, bringing BLSH onchain
evidence.fact: Bullish said shareholders can hold BLSH ordinary shares as tokens on Solana, calling itself the first NYSE-listed company to fully tokenize its own equity cap table, with Equiniti administering the launch.

evidence.source: Bullish to acquire Equiniti from Siris
evidence.fact: Bullish said it agreed to acquire Equiniti for $4.2 billion, and highlighted Equiniti's nearly 3,000 issuer clients, 20 million shareholders, and roughly $500 billion in annual payments as the base for a tokenized-securities transfer-agent stack.

Bullish reported Q1 2026 adjusted revenue of $92.8 million and adjusted EBITDA of $35.1 million, and said the proposed Equiniti acquisition would give it the tokenization, ledger, and issuer-relationship pieces needed for blockchain-era market infrastructure.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARKK adding Circle Internet Group ($1.3M on 2026-06-04 and $8.3M on 2026-06-05) plus Coinbase ($2.9M on 2026-06-04 and $2.0M on 2026-06-05), reinforcing that public-market innovation capital is treating regulated stablecoin and agent-payment rails as a live exposure rather than a side theme.

moments.title: Defense Autonomy
moments.oracleView: 地政学、ドローン戦、低コスト自律システム、調達改革が重なることで、防衛はソフトウェア/ロボティクス市場になり始めている。
valueChain: Prime contractors: LMT, RTX, NOC, GD
Autonomy/software: PLTR, KTOS, AVAV
Sensors/components: LHX, TDY, BWXT
Second-order: shipbuilding, energy, secure communications

evidence.fact: a16z announced an investment in Ulysses, a company building autonomous underwater systems.
Portal Space Systems announced a $50M Series A round and listed ARK Invest among participating investors.
ARK's site states the ARK Venture Fund has invested in Portal Space Systems' Series A.

ARK said Kodiak AI doubled its fleet of fully driverless trucks to 20, surpassed 10,700 cumulative paid driverless hours, and won a U.S. Marine Corps contract tied to autonomous expeditionary vehicles.
YC's Summer 2026 Requests for Startups said counter-drone defense is becoming a real-time distributed system problem and explicitly called for startups building the counter-swarm stack.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARKX buying Kratos Defense & Security Solutions for $522.8K on 2026-05-27, extending ARK's spring preference for autonomy and defense-exposed systems.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined Trades of KTOS
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark's combined KTOS page shows ARKK, ARKQ, and ARKX all buying Kratos Defense & Security Solutions on 2026-05-29 for $7.3M, $6.0M, and $2.8M, respectively, confirming that the defense-autonomy bid broadened beyond a one-fund probe.

Kratos reported Q1 2026 unmanned systems revenue up 30.9% year over year to $82.6M, a 1.6x consolidated book-to-bill ratio, and higher FY2026 guidance, with Valkyrie-related activity cited as a growth driver.

moments.title: AI-native Services
moments.oracleView: AIの本当の市場はソフトウェア予算ではなく、人件費、外注費、BPO、導入支援費を直接取りに行くサービスの置換にある。
valueChain: Incumbent SaaS: NOW, CRM, MSFT, ADBE
Human service incumbents: ACN, ADP, PAYX, FIS
Vertical workflow targets: healthcare, insurance, legal, accounting, recruiting
Pressure side: BPO, IT services, seat-based SaaS

evidence.fact: Sequoia argued that services can become the new software as AI companies sell outcomes rather than tools.
Sequoia wrote that for every dollar spent on software, six are spent on services, with more than $500 billion in annual labor spend across software implementation consultants.
YC's Summer 2026 Requests for Startups said the next step is AI-native companies that do not sell software but instead sell the service, targeting a services spend many times larger than software.

moments.title: ARK Risk-on Rebuild
moments.oracleView: ARKは単なる高ベータ再拡張ではなく、AIインフラ、配布面、金融レールという機械経済の制御点へ資本を寄せ、AMD・TER・BIDU・ACHRを資金源にしている可能性がある。

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the rebuild rotating again on 2026-07-01 and 2026-07-02: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF bought CRCL for about $18.4M on 2026-07-01, ARKK/ARKW/ARKF kept adding BLSH across both sessions, ARKK/ARKW/ARKX bought about $39.8M of TSLA on 2026-07-02, and ARKK kept adding XE on both days, while ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF sold about $35.0M of Roku and about $8.5M of BABA across the same two sessions, pointing to continued recycling from China-internet and legacy streaming exposure into AI, tokenized-financial rails, and power-linked infrastructure.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the rebuild broadening again on 2026-06-23 and 2026-06-24: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF bought PLTR, GOOG, TSLA, AMZN, CRWV, and CBRS across the two sessions, while ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF kept selling Roku for about $53.3M and ARKW kept trimming BIDU, suggesting ARK is recycling capital from streaming and China-internet exposure back into AI platform, mega-cap, and front-end compute bets.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the rotation turning back toward consumer-interactive software on 2026-06-22: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF bought Roblox ($17.1M, $4.3M, and $1.9M) while the same three funds kept selling Roku ($10.7M, $9.7M, and $1.9M), suggesting ARK is still recycling attention exposure rather than restoring the prior streaming-platform position.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKK selling AMD ($32.7M) and buying AMZN ($32.3M) on 2026-04-24.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKW selling AMD ($25.5M) and buying AMZN ($25.1M) on 2026-04-24.

Cathie's Ark lists ARKK selling AMD ($32.2M) and buying GOOG ($16.4M) and META ($16.3M) on 2026-04-30.

Cathie's Ark lists ARKW buying RBLX ($2.6M) and selling AMD ($2.5M) on 2026-05-01.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKF buying RBLX ($1.3M) and selling AMD ($1.2M) on 2026-05-01.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKK buying SHOP ($20.7M), WGS ($6.8M), and NTLA ($2.9M) while selling CRWV ($10.8M), AMD ($10.2M), and TER ($7.6M) on 2026-05-05.
Cathie's Ark lists ARKG buying WGS ($1.8M) while selling TXG ($818.0K) and TWST ($476.9K) on 2026-05-05.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed lists ARKK and ARKG buying NTRA ($690.9K and $156.0K) and ARKK buying NTLA ($590.4K) while ARKK and ARKG kept selling TWST ($2.9M and $338.7K) plus ARKG sold CDNA ($314.7K) on 2026-05-12.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the 2026-05-14 to 2026-05-15 source-of-funds basket broadening: ARKK and ARKW kept trimming TSM ($11.6M, $18.5M, $4.9M, and $5.8M), ARKW kept selling AMD ($5.1M and $5.8M), ARKK kept selling TER ($8.1M and $12.6M) and TWST ($564.1K and $816.3K), and ARKG continued TWST, CDNA, and ADPT trims into 2026-05-15.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK rotating again on 2026-05-19 by buying Bullish across ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF ($1.7M, $499.3K, and $230.2K) while selling Roku across the same three funds ($1.9M, $122.9K, and $94.4K) and exiting Kaspi.kz ($387.5K) plus Intercontinental Exchange ($786.4K) in ARKF.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK extending the rotation on 2026-05-20: ARKK bought Cerebras Systems ($25.7M) and kept adding Bullish across ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF ($2.1M, $622.8K, and $287.4K) while funding the shift with further Roku ($11.7M, $514.6K, and $316.6K), AMD ($11.0M), and Teradyne ($5.5M) sales.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the rebuild broadening again on 2026-05-27: ARKK and ARKW added CBRS ($165.0K and $44.3K), ARKG bought TEM ($1.2M), ARKX bought KTOS ($522.8K), and ARKK added AMZN ($6.5M), extending ARK's preference for selective compute, autonomy, healthcare data, and commerce exposure.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined Trades of KTOS
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark's combined KTOS page shows the rebuild leaning harder into autonomy on 2026-05-29: ARKK, ARKQ, and ARKX all bought Kratos Defense & Security Solutions for $7.3M, $6.0M, and $2.8M, respectively, adding a fresh multi-fund defense systems leg after the late-May CBRS and TEM adds.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARKF shifting its fintech sleeve on 2026-05-28 by buying FUTU ($2.2M) while selling Kaspi.kz ($1.1M), Intercontinental Exchange ($825.1K), and Robinhood ($1.2M).

Futu reported Q1 2026 revenue up 24.7% year over year to HK$5.86B, client assets up 47.2% to HK$1.22T, and cumulative ADS repurchases of about $418M as of May 27, while also disclosing a proposed RMB1.85B CSRC penalty.
Robinhood reported 27.6M funded customers, $345.4B of platform assets, and $6.0B of April net deposits, showing ARK was selling into operating strength rather than obvious business weakness.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK rotating the rebuild back toward canonical AI infrastructure on 2026-06-01: ARKK, ARKQ, ARKW, and ARKF bought NVIDIA for $35.7M, $11.7M, $9.1M, and $4.1M, ARKK and ARKW added Cerebras Systems for $11.1M and $2.8M, and the source of funds was another round of AMD ($31.6M, $11.7M, $5.8M, $4.1M, and $2.1M across five funds) plus Teradyne ($6.0M and $2.7M) sales.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK redirecting the rebuild toward liquid AI platforms on 2026-06-03 by buying Alphabet Class C across ARKK, ARKQ, ARKW, and ARKX ($34.9M, $5.9M, $4.4M, and $2.7M), opening Alphabet Class A across the same four funds ($35.3M, $6.0M, $4.5M, and $2.7M), and adding META ($3.4M) plus BABA ($3.9M) in ARKK while continuing to sell AMD, TER, and BIDU.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK pressing the same shift on 2026-06-04: ARKK added BABA ($31.2M) and META ($25.3M), ARKK/ARKQ/ARKW bought AVGO ($5.9M, $2.0M, and $1.5M), and the source of funds again included major BIDU ($61.3M and $3.3M), TER ($7.0M and $2.3M), and AMD ($1.7M) sales.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the rebuild widening again on 2026-06-05: ARKK added CRCL ($8.3M), COIN ($2.0M), and BEAM ($2.7M), ARKQ and ARKX added DASH, XE, PONY, and KDK, and ACHR sales plus another AMD trim helped fund the new basket.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the same rebuild continuing on 2026-06-08: ARKQ and ARKX kept adding XE, PONY, KDK, and DASH while ARKK, ARKQ, and ARKX sold more ACHR and ARKK trimmed BIDU again, reinforcing that ARK is still funding operating-autonomy and power-exposed bets from older air-mobility and China-internet exposure.

Broadcom reported Q2 FY2026 revenue of $22.2B, AI semiconductor revenue of $10.8B up 143% year over year, and Q3 revenue guidance of about $29.4B with AI semiconductor revenue expected to reach $16.0B, helping explain why ARK was willing to add AVGO immediately after the print.

Pony.ai reported Q1 2026 Robotaxi revenue up 395.4% year over year, total revenue up 145.0% to $34.3 million, and fleet deployment above 1,700 vehicles, which gives ARK's PONY adds a real commercialization backdrop rather than a concept-stock profile.

Kodiak AI said it ended Q1 2026 with 28 customer-owned fully driverless vehicles, more than 23,500 cumulative paid driverless hours, and a new $100 million PIPE, which strengthens the case that ARK's KDK buying is tied to deployed autonomy rather than only pilot-stage promise.

Baidu reported Q1 2026 AI Cloud Infra revenue up 79% year over year to RMB8.8B, GPU Cloud revenue up 184%, and US$172M of share repurchases, which means ARK's June BIDU sales read more like portfolio rotation than a reaction to collapsing core AI metrics.
ARK publishes trade notification files via its Trade Notifications page and provides a latest trade file link.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the same rotation extending on 2026-06-09 and 2026-06-10: ARKQ and ARKX kept adding KDK, XE, and PONY while ARKK and ARKQ sold BIDU, HOOD, IRDM, ROKU, SRTA, and TWST.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the June 11-12 rotation turning more defensive: ARK sold AMD across ARKQ, ARKW, and ARKX ($24.0M, $5.1M, and $11.9M), TER across ARKQ and ARKX ($38.8M and $32.1M), and also cut XE and KTOS, showing the rebuild is still being financed by trimming prior compute, nuclear, and defense-adjacent probes.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the de-risking continued on 2026-06-15 and 2026-06-16: ARKK sold ROKU ($95.0M), TSLA ($18.3M), AMZN ($11.5M), and TSM ($3.0M), ARKQ sold AMD ($35.2M), and ARKX sold AMD ($14.9M then $11.8M), which suggests the rebuild stayed in source-of-funds mode rather than widening into fresh adds.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the rotation changing shape on 2026-06-17 and 2026-06-18: ARKK opened Eli Lilly ($32.2M) and Snowflake ($33.9M), added XYZ ($17.6M), COIN ($14.0M), and TSLA ($17.3M), while ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF kept selling Roku ($30.2M, $1.7M, $1.3M on 2026-06-17 and $77.8M, $21.2M, $890.3K on 2026-06-18) alongside HOOD, BIDU, SRTA, and TWST trims.

moments.title: Berkshire Quality Boring Alpha
moments.oracleView: Berkshireの最新13Fは、AIを完全に避けているというより、Alphabetを抱えつつ、Delta・Macy's・NYT・Lennarを増やし、Chevron・Amazon・Visa・Mastercard・UnitedHealthを引く形で、巨大テック/決済から国内消費・住宅・輸送・信頼メディアへ資本を再配分している。

evidence.fact: Berkshire's 2025-12-31 13F showed a new New York Times position plus Chevron and Domino's additions, while Apple and Amazon remained in the portfolio.

Comparing Berkshire's 2026-03-31 13F with its 2025-12-31 filing shows new Delta Air Lines and Macy's positions, a much larger New York Times stake, disclosed Alphabet holdings, and the absence of Amazon, Visa, Mastercard, and UnitedHealth from the March 31 table.
Berkshire's Q1 2026 Form 10-Q listed $51.5B of cash and cash equivalents, $339.3B of U.S. Treasury Bills, and $17.2B of payables for unsettled Treasury Bill purchases at March 31, 2026.

moments.title: Consumer Attention Reset
moments.oracleView: ROKUのTrimとNYTのNewは逆向きの小さなシグナルだが、広告依存のattentionと、信頼/サブスク/データを持つメディアの差が広がっている可能性がある。

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the Roku exit was still not fully complete on 2026-07-01 and 2026-07-02, with ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF selling about $35.0M more across the two sessions, reinforcing that ARK kept using post-Fox-deal liquidity to finish exiting the legacy streaming-distribution trade.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the Roku exit extending beyond the initial Fox deal burst on 2026-06-23 and 2026-06-24, with ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF selling another roughly $53.3M of Roku across the two sessions, reinforcing that ARK is still using post-deal liquidity to leave the legacy streaming-distribution trade.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARK still exiting Roku after the Fox deal on 2026-06-22, with ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF selling another roughly $22.3M of Roku while buying Roblox across the same three funds for about $23.3M, pointing to a continued shift from legacy streaming distribution toward more interactive attention platforms.

evidence.source: Fox Corporation to Acquire Roku, Inc.
evidence.fact: Fox and Roku said they entered a definitive agreement for Fox to acquire Roku at $160.00 per share, valuing Roku at about $22 billion in enterprise value, with Fox expecting the combined company to become the third-largest player in U.S. television by share of viewing.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows ARKK selling Roku for about $95.0M on 2026-06-15, indicating ARK used the Fox deal day as a liquidity event to exit a large public-attention platform exposure.

evidence.source: Cathie's Ark Combined ARK ETF Trades
evidence.fact: Cathie's Ark combined feed shows the Roku exit continuing after the Fox deal, with ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF selling Roku again on 2026-06-17 and 2026-06-18 for a combined roughly $133.3M, suggesting ARK kept using post-deal liquidity to leave the streaming-attention trade.
